summary: Classified five open PRs independently from the provided preflight artifact. No shared canonical exists for this live inventory shard. Four non-security PRs remain independent, and #87969 is routed to central security handling because its hydrated body discusses SecretRef and exec-related credential handling.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with passing proof/checks but no cluster canonical and no allowed merge/fix path in this job.
Docs PR should stay independently queued for maintainer review; low-signal closeout is explicitly disabled for this job.
Open focused Telegram config PR with failed proof and compatibility risk; keep as independent rather than closing or merging.
Focused bug-fix PR should remain independently queued; linked issue is not hydrated for closeout and proof is failing.
Hydrated PR text contains SecretRef and exec-related credential handling signals, so this exact PR is routed to central OpenClaw security handling rather than backlog cleanup automation.
